analises_hub.subtitle: Complete tactical analysis with data-driven predictions for the biggest UFC events
analises_hub.nenhuma_desc: Weekly analysis will be published 12 hours before each event.

arena.title: Arena
arena.description: Predict the outcome of each fight and earn points if you're right.
arena.no_event_scheduled: No event scheduled at the moment.
arena.stay_tuned: Stay tuned for the next card!
arena.score_desc: Correct picks earn points and XP
arena.dominate_desc: Climb the ranking and win titles
arena.league_subtitle: Create a league and see who predicts best
arena.no_leagues: You're not in any league yet
arena.create_or_join: Create a league or join a public one
arena.leave_league_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave
arena.leave_league_note: Your picks will be kept but you won't be able to see the league ranking.
arena.expel_member_confirm: Are you sure you want to expel
arena.expel_member_note: They can rejoin if they have the invite link.
arena.show_picks_desc: Members can see each other's picks
arena.chat_desc: Members can chat in the league
arena.no_members_participated: No members participated in this event
arena.no_history: Participate in events to see your history
arena.error_league_name: League name must be between 3 and 50 characters
arena.dashboard_no_leagues: You are not in any league yet
arena.login_subtitle: Access your predictions, leagues and duels
arena.registro_subtitle: Join the Arena and start competing
arena.registro_error_username_length: Username must be between 3 and 20 characters
arena.registro_error_username_chars: Username can only contain letters, numbers and _
arena.registro_error_password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
arena.cta_exclusive_subtitle: The Arena is in early access. Get in touch to participate.
arena.league_create_subtitle: Set up how your league will work
arena.league_create_reveal_live_desc: Picks appear as each fight starts, not all at once
arena.league_create_penalty_placeholder: E.g.: Last place pays for dinner
arena.picks_share_text: I made {picksCount}/{totalLutas} predictions for {eventoNome} on Arena UFC! Make yours too.
arena.picks_competing_with: You are competing with {count} users in this event. Rankings update live during the card.
arena.picks_auto_count_leagues: Your picks automatically count in all your leagues
arena.picks_create_league_cta: Create a league and challenge friends — your picks count there too
arena.avatar_choose_subtitle: Customize your profile with a unique image
arena.history_no_predictions: You haven't made any predictions yet
arena.howto_subtitle: Learn how the predictions, scoring and achievements system works in the UFC Arena
arena.howto_when_predict_desc: Predictions open every Sunday at 12pm and close 1 hour before the event on Saturday. You have the whole week to analyze the card!
arena.howto_what_predict_desc: For each fight you choose: the winner, the method of victory (KO/TKO, Submission or Decision) and which round. The more specific, the more points!
arena.howto_edit_predict_desc: Yes! You can edit your predictions as many times as you want until 1 hour before the event starts.
arena.howto_what_leagues_desc: Leagues are private groups where you compete with friends. Create a league, share the code and see who predicts best!
arena.howto_league_picks: Do I need to make separate picks for each league?
arena.howto_league_picks_desc: No! Your picks automatically count in all your leagues. Pick once, compete everywhere.
arena.howto_start_desc: Create your account, make your predictions and invite your friends to a league.
arena.roadmap_subtitle: Features planned for the next version of the Arena
arena.no_messages_yet: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
arena.possible_points_if_all: Possible points if you get all right
arena.tap_to_change: Tap to change winner, method or round
arena.login_to_chat: Log in to join the league chat.
arena.be_first_message: Be the first to send a message!
arena.login_to_see_stats: Log in to see your stats!
arena.join_league_to_compete: Join a league to compete with friends!
arena.first_prediction_activity: Make your first prediction to see activity here!
arena.participate_to_see_history: Participate in events to see your history
arena.correct_to_see_distribution: Get predictions right to see your method distribution
arena.participate_to_see_results: Participate in an event to see your results here!

comments.error_loading: Error loading comments. Try reloading the page.

landing.hero_desc: Deep card analysis with your colors and logo. Live Arena to keep your followers locked in. A Creator Kit page that pulls every format you already publish into one spot. One free week to put it through the wringer.
landing.problem_time_desc: per card. Researching stats, cross-referencing records, building narrative. Nobody has time to do it right every week.
landing.problem_quality_desc: Without verified data, content turns into hot takes and gut feel. Generic. Sounds like the next guy.
landing.problem_scale_desc: fights per card. Covering just the main event leaves traffic on the table. Cover the full card and you capture more searches, more clicks, more subscribers.
landing.revenue_4x_desc: content output. From 2-3 to 8-12 posts per week. Each post is a chance for engagement, a share, or a new follower.
landing.revenue_15h_desc: saved per card. That is 60+ hours per month you can reinvest into video production, community building, or sponsorship outreach.
landing.revenue_42_desc: UFC events per year, all covered. Zero gaps in your publishing calendar.
landing.compare_creator_1_sub: Attention fades quickly after the event
landing.compare_creator_2_sub: Analysis lives in Google Docs or phone notes
landing.compare_creator_3_sub: No plan for the full card week
landing.compare_octagon_1_value: Live Arena with chat and predictions
landing.compare_octagon_1_sub: Followers spend time with you beyond the video
landing.compare_octagon_3_sub: Pulls the formats you already publish into one place
landing.compare_octagon_4_sub: Followers come back every day for the next chapter
landing.pipeline_desc: Not a generic chatbot. A purpose-built intelligence stack with proprietary data, real-time research, and hard validation gates.
landing.pipeline_1_desc: Automated collection of stats, records and odds from multiple sources in real time
landing.pipeline_2_desc: Proprietary database with 3000+ fighters — history, camps, injuries, trends
landing.pipeline_3_desc: 15-22 searches per fight: recent interviews, camp changes, fight week updates
landing.pipeline_4_desc: Analysis dressed in your channel's visual identity, a Creator Kit page that hosts your formats, and a narrative arc for the full card week
landing.analise_tagline_desc: JDM heads home to Perth after getting handled 50-45 by Makhachev. Prates rolls in red-hot off a vicious KO of Edwards. The 5-inch reach edge belongs to the Brazilian.
landing.analise_narrative_1_desc: Former champ returns home after Makhachev dragged him to the mat for 20+ minutes and ran the 50-45. Six months on the shelf before this.
landing.analise_narrative_2_desc: Two finishes in five months: spinning back elbow on Neal, straight left putting former champ Edwards down. Fighting Nerds is the camp of the moment.
landing.analise_narrative_3_desc: Five inches of reach for Prates. Heavy hands, RNC on the resume. JDM has to close the pocket to get his boxing going.
landing.analise_narrative_4_desc: Line opened Prates -165 and moved to JDM -120 with the home crowd. Polymarket has Prates at 61%. Home advantage vs size and momentum.
landing.analise_sections_desc: Every fight gets this level of depth. Automatically.
landing.analise_cta_sub: Branded. Ready for the full week.
landing.arena_desc: A space for creators to run their own leagues and play alongside their followers. Every league gets its own chat, tracks fight results live, scores weekly by card, and refreshes the leaderboard right after the bell on every event.
landing.arena_what_desc: Arena is how creators turn their audience into participants and crack open new content formats. Live streams reacting to the leaderboard during the card. Weekly prizes for the followers sitting on top of the rankings. Sponsor discount codes for the leaders. Organic content built off the picks themselves: who nailed every leg, who blew it on a coin-flip lock.
landing.arena_how_step1_desc: Who you've got walking out with the W.
landing.arena_how_step3_desc: Which round it ends, if it doesn't go the distance.
landing.arena_how_points: Points reward precision: nail the winner, you score; nail the method too, you score more; nail the round, you stack the bag.
landing.arena_creative_title: How You Use It Is Your Call
landing.arena_creative_desc: Arena is the tool. The activation is yours. Lives, prizes, sponsor codes, post-fight debates. Arena keeps the conversation going between your channel and your audience all week long, not just on fight night.
landing.arena_retain_desc: every week. Fans who make picks come back to check results, rankings, and compete with friends. On fight night, they follow live results with real-time chat. It is not just watching anymore. It is participating.
landing.arena_community_desc: private to your channel. Your followers create teams, compete against each other, have their own chat. The league of your podcast, YouTube, or Instagram.
landing.arena_content_desc: events per year. Each event is an engagement opportunity: who nailed it, who blew it, who leads the season. Content that creates itself.
landing.arena_feature_2: Public and private leagues with seasons
landing.arena_feature_5: Chat per event and per league
landing.arena_feature_6: Profiles with stats, streaks and history
landing.arena_whitelabel: White-label available: your brand, your colors, your domain
landing.arena_explore_desc: Browse the Arena, see how it works. Login and registration are available only for partners.
landing.arena_cta_contact: I Want It For My Channel
landing.creatorkit_desc: It's not our analysis with your colors painted over the top. It's a dedicated page for your channel that pulls every format you already publish into one spot — from cycle parlay to weekly picks, breakdowns to IG and podcast prompts. Our research, your formats, one page.
landing.creatorkit_how_desc: Every kit starts with a deep dive into your profile and every one of your content channels. From there, we build a page that ships material in the format you already publish, with the elements your audience already expects.
landing.creatorkit_how_step1_desc: We dig into your Instagram, YouTube, Podcast, Twitch, X. How you write, what your audience reacts to, what your angle is, which formats you've already locked in.
landing.creatorkit_how_step2_desc: Cycle parlay, slimeball, weekly breakdown, fade pick, gimme pick, round table, curated stat list. The formats are yours. We come in as infrastructure: card research, verified data, narrative ready for each piece.
landing.creatorkit_how_step3_desc: Everything in one spot. Picks, parlay, breakdowns, IG carousel, podcast cues, affiliate links. A page that becomes the official destination for your card content.
landing.creatorkit_adapt_desc: There's no single template. HayJive runs cycle parlay, slimeball, big jive. Another creator might run a written column, a video round table, a curated stat list, a live debate. The page is built around what you actually do, not what we think you should be doing.
landing.creatorkit_example_desc: Della Maddalena vs Prates, UFC Fight Night Perth. 3 Locks, Cycle Parlay, Slimeball, Fade pick, Big Jive. All on one page in HayJive's voice and visual.
landing.creatorkit_package_1_desc: Every fight from main event to prelims, with 7 detailed sections: tale of the tape, current form, competition level, statistical comparison, skills profile, win distribution and final prediction.
landing.creatorkit_package_2_desc: One page hosting your formats, your voice, your visual. The official destination for your card content.
landing.creatorkit_package_3_desc: Your channel's private league open before the card. Followers make picks, you engage with the live leaderboard.
landing.creatorkit_package_4_desc: After the event, a Wrap Up of what shifted on the card and material for post-event coverage. The cycle doesn't stop on Sunday.
landing.creatorkit_roi_desc: Crenas is an assistance layer. We give you the infrastructure: deep analysis, a single page in your format, active Arena, post-card coverage. The outcome depends on how you use it. Creators who use it well end up publishing more and better, more often. The return shows up in retention, active community, and indirect monetization. We don't promise numbers — we help you do more, better.
landing.contact_desc: Want to test one free week on your channel? Get in touch.
landing.faq_1_q: What exactly do I receive every week?
landing.faq_1_a: For each UFC card: a branded analysis in your colors and logo, a Creator Kit page that hosts the formats you already publish, a structured narrative arc for the full week, and a live Arena to keep your followers in the loop. After the event, a Wrap Up flagging what changed and what to lead your coverage with.
landing.faq_2_q: Are the data and stats verified?
landing.faq_2_a: Yes. 4-stage pipeline: live scraping, proprietary database with 3000+ fighters, deep research (15-22 searches per fight), and automated mechanical validation. Zero made-up stats.
landing.faq_3_q: How does the free week work?
landing.faq_3_a: One week building everything from scratch for your channel: the branded page, Arena setup, first Creator Kit page in your format. You take it for a spin on a real card and decide if the flow fits your day-to-day. One week is too short to read engagement — it's about whether the tool is user-friendly and you want to keep going.
landing.faq_4_q: How does the Predictions Arena work?
landing.faq_4_a: Your followers pick winners, methods, and rounds, compete in your channel's private leagues, and climb the leaderboard. Can be plugged in as white-label to drive engagement and retention.
landing.faq_5_q: How do I measure the return?
landing.faq_5_a: Your own engagement, over time. Crenas is an assistance layer: we hand you the data, structure, and tools to cover the full card with quality. The outcome rides on how you use it. Creators who use it well tend to see retention, growth, and indirect monetization (CPM, sponsors, affiliates). We don't promise magic — we help you do more, better.
landing.faq_6_a: Depends on the package. Starts with one free week, then we talk about what makes sense for your channel. Reach out via WhatsApp or email.
